title: Questions about Eva
wikitext:
[]: Questions about Eva.             Quote Post by Xavierla » Fri Feb 08, 2013 3:42 am 1. I am not sure if any one noticed this in Evangelion 2.0 but when Mari shows Shinji the battle field it highly resembles the ending of episode 26 where Shinji is siting in a chair in the middle of a foggy forest. 2. Why does Shinji appear to be afraid of himself throughout the entire series. 3. Is it just me or is there always some weird type of shadow that appears at the side of the screen when the Eva goes berserk. Thoughts.

[]: Re: Questions about Eva.             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sat Feb 09, 2013 6:17 am Xavierla wrote: 1. I am not sure if any one noticed this in Evangelion 2.0 but when Mari shows Shinji the battle field it highly resembles the ending of episode 26 where Shinji is siting in a chair in the middle of a foggy forest. 2. Why does Shinji appear to be afraid of himself throughout the entire series. 3. Is it just me or is there always some weird type of shadow that appears at the side of the screen when the Eva goes berserk. Thoughts.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Feb 09, 2013 8:36 am AT field use, short of the blazing octagons, is shown as a slight blurring of the picture.

[]: Re: Questions about Eva.             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Feb 10, 2013 5:10 am 0. Welcome to the fandom, great to know you already checked out the entire frachise so far. 1. Don't think it's intentional, it's not that similar beyond the color palette. 3. Probably not. 2. Hm. That's an interesting analysis right there, it might help if you elaborated, but I did make similar observations. Basically, he did grow up hearing that he's the kid of some guy who used his wife as a guinea pig (episode 16 etc) and generally thinking that he's totally unwanted in this world/ a bother to everyone around him. So, he must be wondering, "What if my true self is the worst person imaginable, like, well, a guy who'd kill his wife"? And then he's thrust into a war, and desperate situations can make even the most normal, non-threatening people do ugly, violent spur-of the moment things. And he's just a random teenager, no a trained soldier. He wasn't pepared to deal with that sort of situation. It's also that he doubts that he can do anything right and is afraid to break things/ end up hurting other people.

[]: Re: Questions about Eva.             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Feb 10, 2013 1:37 pm Xavierla wrote: 2. Why does Shinji appear to be afraid of himself throughout the entire series.
